import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(input)
  mut sum = 0
  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    let token = match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      t
    when None
      ""
    end
    match string.parse_int(token)
    when Some(n)
      if n % 2 == 0
        sum = sum + n
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  print("sum_even=#{sum}")
  Ok(())
end
